stemHtml: Which statement is correct when you considering a ditching situation?

options.a: The aircraft should always land into wind perpendicular to the swell.
options.b: In case of strong winds, you will try to land into the wind which may put you in a position slightly across the swell.
options.c: On the high seas, it is usually best to ditch in any direction considered necessary, regardless of the swell.
options.d: The decision as to landing direction should be made as late as possible to allow for last-minute changes in the behaviour of the main swell.
